species.name: Secondary metabolites and precursors prod. in chloroplast
constraint for import of oxaloacetate wrt carbon balance

body.p: NOTES: GPR curated from Uniprot stating that this enzyme is aheterotetramer, and a phylogenetic tree from an MSA of allgenes from KEGG associated to this reaction to find out whichof the genes not manually curated in Uniprot is an isoform ofwhich manually curated subunit.
ref: Cunningham F. X. et al., 1996, DOI:10.1105/tpc.8.9.1613
ref: Cunningham F. X. et al., 1996, DOI:10.1105/tpc.8.9.1613
References:Reference: Atwell, BJ, et al. (1999) Plants in Action, part II, chap 2.1.8
References:Reference: Atwell, BJ, et al. (1999) Plants in Action, part II, chap 2.1.8

reaction.name: ABC Acyl Transporter D family member 2, chloroplastic
ABC Acyl Transporter D family member 2, chloroplastic
ABC Acyl Transporter D family member 2, chloroplastic

body.p: NOTES: Probably in the ER; noother way to reduce this compound was found

reaction.name: Mehler reaction, oxygen reduction from PSI
Xanthoxin transporter, precursor for ABA production
p-ABA transporter, precursor for THF production
p-ABA exchange, precursor for THF production
trans-zeatin riboside transporter, precursor for zeatin/cytokininin production
trans-zeatin riboside exchange, precursor for zeatin/cytokininin production

body.p: NOTES: Riboflavin produced in chloroplasts and metabolized in plastid, cytosol, mitochondrion according to Sandoval et al 2008 ( 10.1074/jbc.M803416200 )

reaction.name: Isochorismate transporter, precursor for SA production
(2E,4E,6E)-7-Hydroxy-4-methylhepta-2,4,6-trienal sink; byproduct of strigol biosynthesis; fate currently unknown
beta-Ionone sink; byproduct of strigol biosynthesis; fate currently unknown
dithiothreitol reductase; mechanism unknown; required forphylloquinone biosynthesis
recycling of Gla protein precursor; mechanism unknown; required for phylloquinone biosynthesis
